form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Capalaba over 366m. Last start finished 4th on March 1 over 366m at Capalaba behind Reconstruction beaten 3.5 lengths (19.96) in a Grade 4/5. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.
